comment: Subcontract terms library (ADR-0003, SC-S2). Profile ids are the vocabulary of the ITS_Subcontractors 'Default Terms Profile' picklist (shared/picklist_validation._SUBCONTRACTOR_TERMS_PROFILE_VALUES — DERIVED from this manifest, mirroring the PO terms picklist). Version files are IMMUTABLE and sha256-pinned: a wording change is a NEW _vN file, never an edit. The 27-article body carries {{tokens}} filled per-deal by subcontract_generate; legal_review gates live rendering (Layer A — the operator clears a version via the config editor's 'make current').

standard_subcontract.label: Standard 27-article subcontract (2020)
standard_subcontract.description: Evergreen's standard solar-construction subcontract body — the 27-article legal instrument (preamble + Articles 1-27 + signature block). The single most-used form (6 of 7 corpus projects).

negotiated_msa.label: Negotiated MSA (attach-not-generate)
negotiated_msa.description: Subcontractors with a negotiated Master Subcontract Agreement: the renderer emits ONLY the reference line below; the MSA document is attached at send (fast-follow) or already held by both parties. The subcontractor's ITS_Subcontractors 'MSA Reference' cell carries the Box link.
negotiated_msa.render_line: THE WORK DESCRIBED HEREIN IS PERFORMED UNDER, AND SUBJECT TO, THE NEGOTIATED MASTER SUBCONTRACT AGREEMENT BETWEEN CONTRACTOR AND SUBCONTRACTOR.

reserved_profile_ids.short_form: The 4-article Short Form Contract (KSI monthly/recurring subs, corpus 2025.201) — id reserved, transcription deferred to a later slice. Joins the picklist + this manifest when built.
